scope.summary: Add sign-tool --write (alias --in-place) to atomically place generated HMAC signatures in their matching top-level [[tool]] TOML blocks.
out_of_scope: Changing custom-tool signature semantics, validation, or the protected-profile requirement.

entry_points.name: oraclemcp sign-tool --write
entry_points.trace: The command parses --write and --in-place, computes the existing versioned signatures, edits the TOML array of [[tool]] tables, syncs a same-directory temporary file, and atomically replaces the requested file. README documents both modes.

entry_points.name: multi-tool TOML with trailing [[tool.params]]
entry_points.trace: sign_tool_write_places_signatures_inside_tool_blocks_before_trailing_params signs two tools with a final nested params table, asserts both signature lines precede their params tables, reparses the written file, and verifies both envelopes through the production verifier.

limitations: Scoped checks only: cargo test -p oraclemcp setup_and_sign_tool_commands_parse -- --nocapture (1 passed); cargo test -p oraclemcp sign_tool_write_places_signatures_inside_tool_blocks_before_trailing_params -- --nocapture (1 passed); cargo run -p oraclemcp -- sign-tool --help (shows --write); rustfmt --check; and git diff --check. The full workspace gate was not run for this close.
